landing.hero_sub: Stop guessing. Start knowing. Track the TRUE Landed Cost of every unit, see your cargo on a live map, and get alerts before you lose money.
landing.pain_sub: Most importers bleed cash on hidden freight costs, surprise delays, and missing docs. Stop the bleeding.
landing.pain_1_desc: You buy for $10, sell for $15, and think you made $5. But after Freight, Tax, and Trucking, you actually LOST money. We prove it.
landing.pain_2_desc: Your goods are on a ship, at the port, or in a truck. If you can't see it on a map, you can't control it.
landing.pain_3_desc: Customs needs the Packing List NOW. You check email, WhatsApp, Dropbox. It's gone. With Landed, it's attached to the shipment forever.
landing.features_sub: We replaced generic warehouse tools with features that actually save you money.
landing.feature_1_desc: Automatically allocate Freight, Insurance, and Duty to every single unit. Know your TRUE COGS instantly.
landing.feature_2_desc: Don't read lists. See your cargo on a live World Map. Auto-geocoded ports and cities.
landing.feature_3_desc: Attach Bill of Lading, Invoice, and Packing Lists directly to the shipment. Never lose a document again.
landing.feature_4_desc: Get warned 14 days before supplier holidays (CNY, Lebaran) stop your flow. Never run out of stock again.
landing.feature_5_desc: Instant Telegram alerts when shipments arrive, costs spike, or margins drop below your target.
landing.feature_6_desc: Stop waiting for the accountant. See your exact Net Profit per item, every single day.
landing.cta_footer_title: Ready to master your Supply Chain?
landing.cta_footer_sub: Join smart importers who know their true costs.
landing.footer_desc: GetLanded: The Operating System for Modern Importers.
